description_long: This object is a rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a sturdy metal frame and textured fabric panels. The cabinet has a boxy shape with clean lines and a muted beige color, complemented by a light gray metal structure that forms the legs and frame. The top and sides are fully enclosed, and the front appears to be a solid panel without visible handles, drawers, or label holders. The overall construction suggests durability and a contemporary aesthetic, suitable for urban environments. The cabinet sits elevated on four metal legs, providing clearance beneath it. There are no visible locks, handles, or interactive components, giving it a seamless and monolithic appearance.
description: A modern, boxy filing cabinet with a beige fabric exterior and a light gray metal frame, featuring clean lines and no visible handles or drawers. The design is minimalist and sturdy, elevated on four metal legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid beige fabric panel and the light gray metal frame, with the top and side fully enclosed.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full width of the cabinet, highlighting the continuous fabric surface and the supporting metal legs.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view revealing the flat top surface and the seamless transition between the fabric and metal frame.
description_view_3: Front view showing the uninterrupted fabric panel, with no visible handles, drawers, or label holders.
